text:
Created attachment 194589
py-swagger-spec-validator-2.3.1.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates devel/py-swagger-spec-validator to 2.3.1 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/Yelp/swagger_spec_validator/compare/v2.1.0...v2.3.1

Changes to the port:
- updated RUN_DEPENDS to match the new dependencies

QA:
